question: Transformer T-018 has a sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline. Determine the likely root cause class and recommend one confirmatory measurement.
answer: Based on the correlation, the likely root cause class is Arc Discharge. To confirm this, a Dissolved Gas Analysis (DGA) test for Acetylene (C2H2) is recommended. This measurement will help to determine the extent of oil decomposition and verify the presence of arc discharge.

output.name: Arc Discharge
output.description: High-energy arcing causing severe oil decomposition. Very high C2H2 and H2.

history.content: Based on the correlation, the likely root cause class is Arc Discharge. To confirm this, a Dissolved Gas Analysis (DGA) test for Acetylene (C2H2) is recommended. This measurement will help to determine the extent of oil decomposition and verify the presence of arc discharge.

scenario.text: Transformer T-018 has a sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline. Determine the likely root cause class and recommend one confirmatory measurement.
scenario.characteristic_form: The answer should classify the likely failure/root-cause class from gas behavior and propose one concrete confirmatory measurement or inspection step.
